general.note: Quests that can lose stacks will never drop below milestone thresholds.
Pinnacle Rewards renamed to Mythic Rewards.

Summoned Units now lose health each second (health and duration adjusted to compensate). Structures now prioritize Summoned Units when no minions remain, and Summoned Units no longer take half damage from Structures.
Watch Towers reset to neutral after 45 seconds unoccupied.

notes: Triglav Protector Basic Attacks deal +100% damage to structures (up from +50%), base attack damage reduced, scaling increased with 2 players.
Burn duration now displayed on affected structures.

heroes.name: Azmodan
notes: Globe of Annihilation deals 50% damage to non-Heroes.
Demon Warriors reworked — now have 2 charges, lose health over time, deal double damage to Minions/Mercs.
Multiple talent adjustments including Pride moved to baseline at 450 stacks.

heroes.name: Deathwing
notes: Major rework — Form Switch now only occurs on landing.
Attack damage reduced. Ability costs and cooldowns restructured.
Cataclysm gains a new Mythic quest (2,000 stacks for 2,500% damage to Structures/Minions).
Dragonflight cooldown reduced to 15s.

heroes.name: Falstad
notes: Lightning Rod range reduced, time between strikes increased.

heroes.name: Jaina
notes: New Mythic quest on Frostbite — at 30,000 ability damage to chilled Heroes, Ice Block allows moving and casting while active.

heroes.name: Kael'thas
notes: Convection reward increased to 200 damage / 100 health.

heroes.name: Kerrigan
notes: Ravage quest reworked with proximity-based stacking.
Free charge kill window reduced.

heroes.name: Muradin
notes: Storm Bolt quest reworked — stacks from Basic Attacks on slowed/stunned targets. Mythic Reward: +50% range, +100% width, pierces all.
Give 'em the Axe moved to Level 1.
Mountain King reworked.

heroes.name: Murky
notes: Gains 35% Shield on revive. Slime now affects Structures.
Pufferfish quest reworked — Mythic Reward at 400 stacks grants 50% Health.
Shell Game and Egg Shell reworked. Big Tuna Kahuna removed.

heroes.name: Sylvanas
notes: Mercenary Queen now applies 3 stacks of Black Arrows to Mercs.

heroes.name: Thrall
notes: Basic Attack damage reduced.
Crash Lightning and Echo of the Elements Mythic rewards buffed.

heroes.name: Tyrande
notes: Lunar Flare gains a new Mythic quest (at 45 Hero hits, Basic Attacks occasionally trigger Lunar Flare).
Mana costs increased across abilities.
Moonlit Arrows moved to Level 1. Multiple talent shuffles.

heroes.name: Alarak
notes: Deadly Charge activation fix when in Trait slot.

heroes.name: Ana
notes: Aim Down Sights can now be toggled during Silence.

heroes.name: Jaina
notes: Frostbolt model fix for Dreadlord/Lunar skins.

heroes.name: Orphea
notes: Allegrissimo cooldown reduction fix.

heroes.name: Sylvanas
notes: Possession Quick Cast and cooldown reduction fixes.

heroes.name: Tychus
notes: Odin Thrusters cooldown display fix.
